narrative.headline: What 2016 Jeep Cherokee owners report most
narrative.summary: The dominant pattern in owner complaints is powertrain trouble, particularly the transmission shutting down unexpectedly while the vehicle is in motion. Engine stalling without warning — sometimes requiring multiple restart attempts — and electrical system failures that leave the vehicle unable to restart are also widely reported. Brake-related complaints, which include software upgrades noted by dealers, round out the picture of a vehicle whose owners frequently report losing control of basic driving functions.

issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: Owners report the transmission shutting down without warning while the vehicle is in motion, leaving the driver unable to proceed. · 3 fire · 7 crash · 3 injured

issues.sample: TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2016 JEEP CHEROKEE. WHILE DRIVING 45 MPH, THE VEHICLE STALLED WITHOUT WARNING. THE FAILURE RECURRED INTERMITTENTLY. THE VEHICLE TOOK MULTIPLE ATTEMPTS TO RESTART. THE VEHICLE WAS TAKEN TO THE DEALER WHERE IT WAS DIAGNOSED THAT THE VEHICLE NEEDED AN OIL CHAN
issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle stalling without warning at driving speeds, with the engine requiring multiple attempts to restart. · 4 fire · 2 crash

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle stalling and becoming impossible to restart immediately, with the ability to restart sometimes returning only after the vehicle has sat for a period of time. · 4 fire · 2 crash · 1 injured

issues.title: Service Brakes
issues.blurb: Owners report brake concerns prompting dealer visits, where dealers have applied software upgrades as part of the service response. · 4 crash · 3 injured
